title: Publish v0.5.39 release metadata through protected PR
rawUserRequest: 同意，走完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程后再发布；每次发现流程问题都从根本上修改，不做表面重复。当前只修正受保护主分支的发布元数据流程，不启动或跳过任何计划内工单；预算和格式检查必须作为事前门禁，不单独拆预算工单。

declaredIntent.summary: 将 v0.5.39 发布元数据通过受保护默认分支的独立 PR 生命周期交付，并在合并、ai-close-work-item 和默认分支同步后再进行发布确认。

outOfScope: Git tag creation and provider release publication
Provider assets, SBOM, provenance, and external release evidence

sources.reason: Canonical release metadata generator and source identity rules.
Release metadata and source/archive preflight gate.
Version and archive metadata consumed by release workflow.
Predecessor evidence for the finalizer synchronization root correction.

riskAssessment.reason: Metadata must remain internally consistent while being delivered through a protected PR.

executionDecision.reason: Release metadata candidate is scoped to a protected PR; provider publication remains a later gated operation.

preReviewWarnings: Review source commit/archive digest stability and canonical release-state synchronization before merge.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Release metadata for v0.5.39 is generated from the latest synchronized origin/main state and has matching archive/source digests.
release-state.json metadataDigests.published exactly matches the generated release.json digest.
PR-stage metadata, format, budget, and release-state consistency checks pass; the full release preflight runs only after PR merge, ai-close-work-item, and default-branch synchronization.
The metadata is delivered only through a PR; no direct default-branch push or provider publication occurs in this Work Item.
The Work Item completes the full archive, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch-cleanup, and default-sync lifecycle.
guidelines: Generate metadata with the repository release finalizer; do not hand-edit generated release projections.
Canonical release-state projections must be updated atomically with the metadata they digest.
Keep template-repository release metadata separate from adopter-project installation changes.
Budget and formatting checks are mandatory preflight gates; do not create a budget-only Work Item.

intent.problem: Directly committing generated release metadata to the protected default branch was rejected, and the release-state published digest could become stale relative to release.json.
constraints: Use a dedicated Work Item branch from latest origin/main.
Do not publish or tag from this Work Item.
Preserve exact generated metadata and pass budget/format gates before PR.
intent.rationale: Make release metadata reviewable and mergeable through the same protected PR lifecycle as all other governed changes, while validating canonical digest synchronization before publication.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete Contract/Preflight/PR/merge/ai-close-work-item release workflow and version publication.

rollbackNote: Revert the metadata PR before provider publication; restore the prior release projections and retain the archived Work Item evidence.

budgetImpact.reason: Release metadata changes add no Python implementation; budget remains measured and enforced in this functional release Work Item.
